name: Match Customer with DRI
description: Service task to match a customer with their designated relationship individual (DRI)

properties.label: Lookup Mode
properties.description: Choose how to identify the customer.

properties.label: Customer ID
properties.description: The unique identifier of the customer to match. Can be a static value or FEEL expression (e.g., =customerId, =order.customerId)

properties.label: Customer ID
properties.description: Optional customer ID for flexible mode.

properties.label: Customer Name
properties.description: The name of the customer to match (alternative to Customer ID). Can be a static value or FEEL expression (e.g., =customerName, =customer.name)

properties.label: Customer Name
properties.description: Optional customer name for flexible mode.

properties.label: Allow Multiple Results
properties.description: Controls whether multiple customer matches can be returned. Use true or false, or FEEL runtime mapping (for example: =allowMultipleVar).

properties.label: Allow Multiple Results
properties.description: Optional in flexible mode. Use true or false, or FEEL runtime mapping (for example: =allowMultipleVar).

properties.label: Fuzzy Matching
properties.description: Enable fuzzy/partial matching. Use true or false, or FEEL runtime mapping (for example: =fuzzyMatchingVar).

properties.label: Fuzzy Matching
properties.description: Enable fuzzy matching in flexible mode. Use true or false, or FEEL runtime mapping (for example: =fuzzyMatchingVar).

properties.label: Result Variable
properties.description: Process variable to store the complete matching result (customer, employee details, and status)

properties.label: Customer ID Output
properties.description: Process variable to store the matched customer ID

properties.label: Customer Name Output
properties.description: Process variable to store the matched customer name

properties.label: Customer Address Output
properties.description: Process variable to store the matched customer address

properties.label: Customer Trust Level Output
properties.description: Process variable to store the matched customer trust level (L1, L2, or L3)

properties.label: Employee ID Output
properties.description: Process variable to store the matched employee ID

properties.label: Employee Name Output
properties.description: Process variable to store the matched employee name

properties.label: Match Status Output
properties.description: Process variable to store the match status (SUCCESS or NOT_FOUND)
